Title: Home Office computer
Notes:
Charles reported an issue that he is not able to send the PDF attachment....

so connect to his computer and checked that he has already sent the email...

However he said that he has not received the confirmation email from the user....

so checked the mailbox and informed that the mail has been sent and there was no bounceback email....so mail has been sent..

May be the user has not seen yet....so he said he will call the user and check with him if required he will let us know...

hence closing the ticket.....

Title: SQL Backup Not Syncing to OneDrive
Notes:
gged into the server to investigate why the SQL backup was not moving to OneDrive.

Verified that the backup was successfully completed on the SQL Server, but it was not syncing to OneDrive.

Checked the scheduled task and found an issue with the scheduler. Re-ran the scheduler manually and monitored the process.

After re-running, confirmed that the backup has now successfully moved to OneDrive.

Title: My Remote version 25.9.9.9533 updated on CCC Servers
Notes: Review the my remote portal, and found  the machine CCC-DC-AD-01, CCC-DC-SQL-02, CCC-DC-TSVDI-01 &  DESKTOP-4TTOOKT running with old version of My Remote. Tried to reinstall the agent from my remote portal, but not succeeded. Tried to restart the service and reinstall again, but unable to update it. So connected to the machine from manage engine  . Uninstalled the old version and reinstalled the latest version 25.9.9.9533. After that refresh the machine from the portal. It was updated to latest version of My Remote. Hence closing this ticket.
